---
title: Optimize PNG
---

For more info, see <https://pkg.yihui.org/tinyimg/>

```{r}
test_plot = function(expr, filename = tempfile(fileext = '.png'), ...) {
  png(filename, ...)
  expr
  dev.off()
  filename
}
```

## The original plot

```{r}
out = test_plot({
  par(mar = c(4, 4, 1, .1))
  with(penguins, plot(bill_len ~ bill_dep, pch = 19, col = species))
})
img = xfun::html_tag("img", src = xfun::base64_uri(out), alt = "Original")
litedown::raw_text(img)
```

## The optimized plot

```{r}
tinyimg::tinypng(out)
img = xfun::html_tag("img", src = xfun::base64_uri(out), alt = "Optimized")
litedown::raw_text(img)
```

Can you see any difference?
